scripts.setup: pnpm install && cp -n apps/api/.dev.vars.example apps/api/.dev.vars 2>/dev/null || true && cp -n apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env.local 2>/dev/null || true && cp -n apps/admin/.env.example apps/admin/.env.local 2>/dev/null || true && echo '\nSetup done. Edit apps/*/{.dev.vars,.env.local} with your credentials, then run: pnpm dev'
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply app-local --local --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply app-staging --remote --env staging --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply app-prod --remote --env production --config apps/api/wrangler.toml
